name: emmy-planning-context
description: Ambient Emmy Goals Space context loading and authorized Planning Log appends.

interface.shortDescription: Use Emmy goals to ground planning.
interface.longDescription: Adds Confluence-backed workflows for loading current Emmy strategic principles, active delivery goals, outcomes, and optional Planning Log context, plus an explicit write-gated skill for appending approved Planning Log entries.
defaultPrompt: Ground this Emmy planning task in current goals.
Check whether this work aligns to Emmy outcomes.
Append the approved Emmy planning log entry.
